chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5616 of 2024 CP D 1551 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No.24931/2024. 3. For hearing of main case. 06.02.2025 Mr. Usman Farooq, advocate for the petitioners in CP D 5616 of 2024. Mr. Najaf Abbas Zaidi, advocate holding brief for Mr. Abbadul Hussnain, advocate for the petitioner in CP D 1551 of 2024. Mr. Asadullah Jan, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Imran Ahmed Khan Abro, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. Petitioners are stated to be federal government employees who availed the benefit of federal government houses. These petitions challenge the levy of development charges in such respect. Learned counsel when confronted as to what vested right was available to be absolved of any such charges, could not provide satisfactory response. Counsel sought to demonstrate any constitutional right to be absolved of any charges found applicable to allottees. Both the petitions are found to be misconceived, hence, dismissed. Office to place a copy hereof in the connected file. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
